user_query: Give me a summary of all activity related to my next calendar event.

plan.query: Give me a summary of all activity related to my next calendar event.
plan.reasoning: The query pertains specifically to calendar events and requires information from the graph agent to provide a summary of the next event, including any related communication or scheduling activities.

steps.task: Retrieve the next calendar event along with any associated emails or communication history related to that event.

plan.synthesis: Summarize the details and activities related to the next calendar event based on the information received from the graph agent.

invoked_agents.input: Retrieve the next calendar event along with any associated emails or communication history related to that event.
